translations.en: a young woman who stares into the distance.
"I recognize your voice." She smiles.
"Hello? Is someone there?"
"Stephanie, but you can call me '@Steph.'"
translations.zh: 「史黛芬妮，但你可以叫我『@小黛』。」

translations.en: "That's better."
"But I sense none with you are dead."
translations.zh: 「但我感知到你們中沒有人死亡。」

translations.en: "We have no 'jobs' here as such."
"But I can @heal, @cure and @resurrect."
translations.zh: 「但我能@療傷、@解毒和@起死回生。」

translations.en: "Good $T, my friend
. Take care." Her long lashes flitter a moment.
"I don't think I'm the one to ask that of."
"Come to my shop when I'm open!"
After touching your brow she states, "You feel fine to me."
translations.zh: 觸摸你的額頭後她說：「你的狀況感覺很好。」

translations.en: She feels each brow and holds her ear close to your mouths.
translations.zh: 她逐一觸摸各人的額頭，將耳朵湊近你們的口邊。

translations.en: "None of you are sick!"
"Which of you?"
"I sense your injury, $Y."
"Will you make an offering of 25 gold?"
She closes her eyes, puts a delicate hand on your brow and chants softly.
translations.zh: 她闔上眼睛，將纖細的手放在你的額頭，輕聲吟誦。

translations.en: You feel much better.
"I cannot heal you if you won't tithe."
translations.zh: 「若你不願奉獻，我便無法為你療傷。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry. Without an offering I cannot heal you."
translations.zh: 「抱歉。沒有奉獻，我無法為你療傷。」

translations.en: "I sense your hesitation is based on your empty pockets."
translations.zh: 「我感知到你的猶豫，源自空空的口袋。」

translations.en: "I also sense your cause is a just one."
translations.zh: 「我也感知到你的事業是正義的。」

translations.en: She closes her eyes, puts a delicate hand on your brow and chants softly.
translations.zh: 她闔上眼睛，將纖細的手放在你的額頭，輕聲吟誦。

translations.en: You feel much better.
Her blue eyes pierce you. "What else can I do for you?"
translations.zh: 她湛藍的眼眸凝視著你。「還有什麼我能為你做的？」

translations.en: "Come to my shop when I'm open!"
She lifts your hand against her lips. "You are not poisoned."
translations.zh: 她舉起你的手抵在唇邊。「你沒有中毒。」

translations.en: Holding each hand against her lips she states "You are not poisoned."
translations.zh: 她逐一舉起各人的手抵在唇邊，說道：「你們沒有中毒。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
"I sense that you are poisoned, $Y."
"Will you make an offering of 5 gold?"
Placing your hand over her heart, she closes her eyes and whispers something.
translations.zh: 她將你的手放在她心口，闔上雙眼，低聲細語。

translations.en: The fever leaves your brow.
"Without the offering I cannot cure you."
"I'm sorry. Without an offering I cannot cure you."
translations.zh: 「抱歉。沒有奉獻，我無法為你解毒。」

translations.en: A tear comes to her eyes.
"I should have known you would not ask unless
translations.zh: 「我早該知道你不會開口，除非

translations.en: [you were in grave need."
"Come, put your hand on my heart."
Placing your hand over her heart, she closes her eyes and whispers something.
translations.zh: 她將你的手放在她心口，闔上雙眼，低聲細語。

translations.en: The fever leaves your brow.
"I sense that someone has met a terrible fate."
translations.zh: 「我感知到有人遭遇了可怕的命運。」

translations.en: "Come to my shop when I'm open!"
"Will you make an offering of 350 gold?"
"Then there is nothing I can do save grieve with you."
translations.zh: 「那我所能做的只有與你同悲。」

translations.en: "You haven't enough gold."
"I'm sorry, all I can do is grieve with you."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，我所能做的只有與你同悲。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection for their fallen comrade.
translations.zh: 你的隊伍為倒下的同伴湊齊了金幣。

translations.en: $N lays hands upon the corpse...
"Doman..."
"thixus..."
"anretu!"
And the dead live again!
"I sense that others have been lost as well..."
translations.zh: 「我感知到還有其他人也失去了……」

translator_notes: 史黛芬妮是盲人療癒師，法蘭的妹妹。她靠觸感和感知能力判斷傷患。復活咒語（Doman/thixus/anretu）以音譯保留。
